items.title: Retail Stocks Usually Rise the Week After Black Friday. This BNPL Play Stands Out.
items.description: Retail stocks typically rise in the week following Black Friday as Wall Street looks to reap the benefits of people rushing to save while shopping for the holidays—but one name could be a standout in 2025.  Black Friday brings in billions of dollars to U.S. businesses annually as price cuts spur shoppers to participate in the retail event and purchase gifts and everyday essentials.  Shoppers spent $11.8 billion online on Black Friday 2025, according to Adobe, above the firm’s forecast of $11.7 billion and a 9.1% increase from the previous year.

items.title: TD Cowen Lowers Home Depot (HD) Price Target Amid Housing Market Concerns
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) ranks among the best slow growth stocks to invest in. On November 19, TD Cowen retained its Buy rating on The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) but lowered its price target from $470 to $410. The adjustment followed Home Depot’s third-quarter result, which fell short of Street expectations, alongside a reduction […]

items.title: Is Home Depot’s Supply Chain Expansion Hiding Value After 8% Slide in 2025?
items.description: Ever wondered if Home Depot’s current share price is a bargain or if there is value hidden beneath the surface? Here is what you need to know before making your next move. The stock has experienced some volatility lately. It rose 4.0% in the past week, but slipped by 5.6% over the last 30 days and is down 8.1% year-to-date. Recent news has highlighted investments in Home Depot’s supply chain expansion and continued efforts to boost its professional customer base. This has generated...
